attachmentCharLimitPlaceholder: Max characters per parsed file (0 = unlimited)
builtinPromptsDescription: Customize the system and user prompts for built-in tools like Translate, Polish, Academic, Summary, and Grammar. Use {language} for the target language placeholder.
emptyAPIKey: Go to settings to set API key
emptyTitle: How can I help you today?
enableMarkdownPlaceholder: Format messages with markdown (headings, bold, code blocks, etc.)
horizontalToolCallsPlaceholder: Stack consecutive tool call bubbles horizontally to save vertical space
lmstudioFilterThinkingPlaceholder: Remove <think>...</think> tags from responses (for reasoning models)
mcpServersDescription: Connect to Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers to extend agent capabilities with external tools. Any MCP-compliant server works — just provide the command to start it.
multiagentCredentialsInfo: Multi-agent will use the credentials configured in the API Provider settings for each selected provider.
multiagentExpertFullHistoryHelp: When enabled, experts receive the conversation history from previous turns (user messages and assistant responses, no tool interactions). When disabled, experts only see the current task.
multiagentExpertsOrderHelp: We recommend setting the smartest Expert first.
multiagentFormatterModelHelp: A cheap/fast model used to extract structured output when experts don't follow the XML format. Only used in Legacy mode.
multiagentOperatingModeHelp: Use Legacy if experts use Claude/Anthropic models. Combined is more efficient for other providers.
quickActionsDescription: Configure up to 8 quick action buttons shown on the main screen. Use $'{language}' as a placeholder for the target language. Only enabled buttons with a name appear.
recursionLimitExceeded: Agent exceeded the maximum number of iterations.
responseIncomplete: Response was interrupted. Please retry to continue.
systemPromptsDescription:
Define additional instructions that apply to all LLM messages while active. Select one from the main screen dropdown to enable it.
Note: These instructions can have unpredictable effects how agents behave and use tools, use with caution.
tavilyApiKeyPlaceholder: Enter your Tavily API key for web search
togetheraiAPIKeyPlaceholder: Enter your Together AI API key
userPromptPlaceholder: Please input user prompt, this prompt will be prepended to the input box content
useExpertParallelizationPlaceholder: Run multiagent experts concurrently instead of sequentially (faster, but may cause race conditions with selection tools)
wordTool_appendText_desc: Append text to the end of the document.
wordTool_clearFormatting_desc: Clear all formatting from selected text, returning it to default style.
wordTool_deleteText_desc: Delete the currently selected text or delete at cursor position.
wordTool_findAndSelectText_desc: Find text in the document and select the first occurrence.
wordTool_findText_desc: Find text in the document and return information about matches.
wordTool_formatText_desc: Apply formatting (bold, italic, underline, font name/size, color, highlight) to selected text.
wordTool_getDocumentContent_desc: Get the full content of the Word document body as plain text.
wordTool_getDocumentProperties_desc: Get document statistics including paragraph count, word count, and character count.
wordTool_getRangeInfo_desc: Get detailed information about the current selection including text and formatting.
wordTool_getSelectedText_desc: Get the currently selected text in the Word document.
wordTool_getTableInfo_desc: Get information about tables in the document.
wordTool_goToBookmark_desc: Navigate to a previously created bookmark in the document.
wordTool_insertBookmark_desc: Insert a bookmark at the current selection to mark a location.
wordTool_insertComment_desc: Add a comment to the currently selected text.
wordTool_insertContentControl_desc: Insert a content control container at the current selection.
wordTool_insertImage_desc: Insert an image from a URL at the current cursor position.
wordTool_insertList_desc: Insert a bulleted or numbered list at the current position.
wordTool_insertPageBreak_desc: Insert a page break at the current cursor position.
wordTool_insertParagraph_desc: Insert a new paragraph at the specified location with optional styling.
wordTool_insertTable_desc: Insert a table at the current cursor position with specified rows and columns.
wordTool_insertText_desc: Insert text at the current cursor position in the Word document.
wordTool_replaceSelectedText_desc: Replace the currently selected text with new text.
wordTool_searchAndReplace_desc: Search for text in the document and replace it with new text.
wordTool_searchAndReplaceInSelection_des: Search for text in the current selection and replace it with new text.
wordTool_selectBetweenText_desc: Select text between two anchor phrases in the document.
wordTool_selectText_desc: Select all text in the document.
wordTool_setParagraphFormat_desc: Apply paragraph formatting (alignment, spacing, indentation) to selected paragraphs.
wordTool_setStyle_desc: Apply a built-in Word style (Heading, Quote, Title, etc.) to selected text.
wordTool_webSearch_desc: Search the web for information. Requires a search API key in Settings.
wordToolsDescription: Built-in tools that AI agents can use to interact with your Word document.
